sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107945" key="u(pe/rfloios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπέρφλοιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107945.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">luxuriant, succulent,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μῆλα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:80" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">80</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (scanned ̆ ̄ ̆ ̆).</sense> </entryFree>
